Off Calendar Apr-29-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT HESHAM ZAKARIA's MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. Sanction denied in the interest of justice. Counsel to the moving party shall submit a proposed order.
